links.source_location: UI shows Base URL input, Campaign Source dropdown (Google), Campaign Medium (CPC), Campaign Name fields, generated UTM URL output with Copy Link and Reset buttons

UI shows raw SQL input panel and beautified/syntax-highlighted SQL output panel side-by-side; toolbar with Format SQL, Minify, Copy, Clear, Share; left sidebar with Formatter, Optimizer, Editor, Library, Settings

UI shows URL input field, Get Thumbnails button, video metadata display, four resolution options (Max Res 1280x720, High Res 640x480, Medium Res 320x180, Standard Res 120x90) each with individual download buttons
Illustrative image showing PSA-graded Pokemon Charizard card slab (Grade 10 GEM MT) with profit overlay showing +$3,450.00, bar chart trend, and calculator icon; trading card hobby niche

UI shows three calculator modes side-by-side: Basic Percentage (% of a value), Percentage Change (increase/decrease), Value from Percent (find full value); each with input fields and Calculate buttons showing live results

UI shows JWT token paste input on left, decoded payload on right with color-coded HEADER (alg: HS256, typ: JWT), PAYLOAD (sub, name, iat, exp, admin, email fields), and SIGNATURE (Verified, HS256 HMAC SHA256) sections
UI shows text input area, case type selector buttons (UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case), output text area with Copy and Clear buttons
Illustrative image showing PSA-graded Panini Lionel Messi 2023 card slab (GEM MT 10) under magnifying glass; tool is for comparing grading companies (PSA etc.) for trading card collectors

UI shows platform tabs (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Pinterest, Threads), keyword/caption input, Generate Hashtags button; results in three tiers: Popular (high reach 23M+), Growing (high engagement 510K+), Niche (low competition 1101K+); Hashtag Stats panel and Selected Hashtags sidebar

UI shows inputs for Box Cost ($299.99), Number of Spots (10), Shipping Cost ($15.00); outputs Spot Cost ($31.50), Total Break Cost ($314.99), and Est. Value/Spot; targets trading card box break organizers

UI shows inputs for Listing Price ($75.00), Shipping Cost ($9.99), Buyer Offer ($62.00); Offer Analytics section with Profit Breakdown bar chart, eBay Fees (13%, $8.06), Net Profit ($51.95), Total Revenue ($62.00), Total Costs ($10.05), Offer Acceptability gauge (High)

UI shows country selector dropdown (UK, Germany, France, Spain, Italy and more), amount input (1200 GBP), Add VAT / Remove VAT toggle; results show Net Amount (1000), VAT Amount (200), Gross Total (1200) at 20% UK rate; recent countries shown as flag icons

Split-pane UI: left shows raw Markdown source with line numbers (AuroraMD branding), right shows live rendered HTML preview; supports headings, bold, checkboxes, code blocks, links; real-time split view
UI shows input type tabs (URL, WiFi, Email, Phone, Text), URL input field, Generate button, large QR code preview, Download PNG and Download SVG buttons; dark minimal design

UI shows Mode Selector tabs (Standard, Fluency active, Formal, Academic, Creative, Shorten), Original Text panel (38 words/211 chars) and Paraphrased Result panel (36 words/196 chars) side-by-side with changed words highlighted in purple; Paraphrase button; WORDCRAFT branding
